name: ambient-jelly-desktop
title: Ambient tab jelly desktop
description: Replace the classic swap-grid game with a quiet browser-tab jelly desktop: freeform layered pieces, tray matching, persistent plant growth, browser-native Picture-in-Picture, and reference-aligned lavender desktop visuals.

notes: Superseded on 2026-07-22 by the completed Ambient Fish, cat companion, feeding, and spotlight task chain. Historical context only; do not resume implementation.
